---
title: "getting_started"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{getting_started}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(pycnogrid)
```


```{r}
#nyc_counties <- 

#census_bg_nyc <- tidycensus::get_acs()
```
